archimate:DataObject.name: Smart Data Models
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: A smart data model includes three elements: The schema, or technical representation of the model defining the technical data types and structure, the specification of a written document for human readers, and the examples of the payloads for NGSIv2 and NGSI-LD versions.
Publisher: Fiware Foundation
Source: https://www.fiware.org/smart-data-models/
LOST view: Semantic view
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SmartDataModelsDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SmartDataModelsDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: A smart data model includes three elements: The schema, or technical representation of the model defining the technical data types and structure, the specification of a written document for human readers, and the examples of the payloads for NGSIv2 and NGSI-LD versions.
